concerns.text: Tasks T203, T204, T207 propose experimental validation (Stark-effect spectroscopy, 100-molecule test set) which contradicts spec.md FR-011 and Assumptions explicitly excluding physical measurement validation. These tasks have no matching FR/SC in the spec and implement out-of-scope requirements.

Tasks T205, T206 require conformational ensembles and hydration state sampling, violating spec.md Assumptions which define 'single lowest-energy conformer' and 'gas-phase DFT' as the scope. No FR/SC supports these tasks.

Tasks T200, T201, T208 introduce geometric constraints (peptide planarity) and physics-informed loss terms not authorized by spec.md FR-004/FR-005. These alter the model architecture beyond the 'lightweight SchNet-style GNN' requirement without a matching spec element.

Tasks T202, T209 mandate atomic partial charges and per-bond dipole vectors as features, contradicting spec.md FR-003 which limits 2D descriptors to 'Morgan fingerprints, Coulomb matrices'. No spec element authorizes these specific feature additions.

Phase 8 contains tasks tagged with simulated reviewer names (Linus Pauling, Marie Curie, etc.) referencing 'Rev 1, 2...' which do not exist in the current spec.md or plan.md. These are stale tags from an older or hypothetical review cycle and should be removed or mapped to actual spec requirements.
